mapper.select: /** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlOnlineAtendList */ select a.evl_mfcmm_id , a.evl_cmit_id , a.extrc_mfcmm_id , a.login_id , a.enc_password , a.use_bgnde , a.use_endde , a.refresh_token , a.charmn , a.atend_sttus_cd , coalesce(fn_cmm_get_code_nm('ATEND_STTUS', a.atend_sttus_cd),'') as atend_sttus_nm , a.atend_dt , coalesce(a.evas, false) as evas , case when a.evas = true then '회피동의' else '' end evas_nm , a.evas_resn_cn , a.creator_id , a.created_dt , a.updater_id , a.updated_dt , c.expert_nm as evl_mfcmm_nm , row_number() over (order by a.created_dt asc) as rn from uspt_evl_mfcmm a inner join uspt_extrc_mfcmm b on a.extrc_mfcmm_id = b.extrc_mfcmm_id inner join uspt_expert c on b.expert_id = c.expert_id where 1 = 1 and a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId}

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.select */ select a.evl_mfcmm_id , a.evl_cmit_id , a.extrc_mfcmm_id , a.login_id , a.enc_password , a.use_bgnde , a.use_endde , a.refresh_token , a.charmn , a.atend_sttus_cd , coalesce(fn_cmm_get_code_nm('ATEND_STTUS', a.atend_sttus_cd),'') as atend_sttus_nm , a.atend_dt , coalesce(a.evas, false) as evas , case when a.evas = true then '회피동의' else '' end evas_nm , a.evas_resn_cn , a.creator_id , a.created_dt , a.updater_id , a.updated_dt , c.expert_nm as evl_mfcmm_nm , row_number() over (order by a.created_dt asc) as rn from uspt_evl_mfcmm a inner join uspt_extrc_mfcmm b on a.extrc_mfcmm_id = b.extrc_mfcmm_id inner join uspt_expert c on b.expert_id = c.expert_id where 1 = 1 and a.evl_mfcmm_id = #{evlMfcmmId}

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlOnlineSttusList */ select row_number() over (order by e.created_dt desc) as rn --번호 , e.receipt_no --접수번호 , a.evl_cmit_id , d.apply_id --신청ID , d.evl_trget_id , e.member_id --회원ID , fn_cmm_get_member(e.member_id) as member_nm --회원명 , a.evl_table_id --평가표id , ( select sum(s.evl_score) from uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr s /*가점항목*/ inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm s1 on s.evl_iem_id = s1.evl_iem_id where s1.evl_table_id = a.evl_table_id and s1.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}' and s.evl_trget_id = d.evl_trget_id and s.evl_cmit_id = a.evl_cmit_id ) as add_score --가점점수합계 , ( select case when count(s.evl_cn) > 0 then '가점' else count(s.evl_cn) || '' end from uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr s /*가점항목*/ inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm s1 on s.evl_iem_id = s1.evl_iem_id where s1.evl_table_id = a.evl_table_id and s1.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}' and s.evl_trget_id = d.evl_trget_id and s.evl_cmit_id = a.evl_cmit_id ) as add_rm --가점비고 , ( select sum(s.evl_score) from uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr s /*가점항목*/ inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm s1 on s.evl_iem_id = s1.evl_iem_id where s1.evl_table_id = a.evl_table_id and s1.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}' and s.evl_trget_id = d.evl_trget_id and s.evl_cmit_id = a.evl_cmit_id ) as minus_score --가점점수합계 , ( select case when count(s.evl_cn) > 0 then '가점' else count(s.evl_cn) || '' end from uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr s /*가점항목*/ inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm s1 on s.evl_iem_id = s1.evl_iem_id where s1.evl_table_id = a.evl_table_id and s1.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}' and s.evl_trget_id = d.evl_trget_id and s.evl_cmit_id = a.evl_cmit_id ) as minus_rm --감점비고 , b.evl_plan_id --평가계획 , c.sect_id , c.sect_nm from USPT_EVL_CMIT a /*위원회 테이블*/ inner join uspt_evl_step b /*평가단계 테이블*/ on b.evl_step_id = a.evl_step_id inner join uspt_sect c /*분과 테이블*/ on c.sect_id = a.sect_id inner join uspt_evl_trget d /*평가대상 테이블*/ on d.evl_step_id = b.evl_step_id and d.sect_id = c.sect_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt e /*사업공고신청자 테이블 */ on e.apply_id = d.apply_id where a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId}

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlOnlineResultList */ select t_data.* , t_data.avrg_score +add_score-minus_score as gnrlz_core --종합점수 from ( select row_number() over (order by e.created_dt desc) as rn --번호 , e.receipt_no --접수번호 , a.evl_cmit_id , d.apply_id --신청ID , d.evl_trget_id , d.slctn , case when d.slctn = true then '선정' when d.slctn = false then '탈락' else '-' end as slctn_nm , to_char(d.slctn_dt , 'yyyy-mm-dd') as fmt_slctn_dt , d.slctn_dt , e.member_id --회원ID , fn_cmm_get_member(e.member_id) as member_nm --회원명 , a.evl_table_id --평가표id , ( select sum(s.evl_score) from uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr s /*가점항목*/ inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm s1 on s.evl_iem_id = s1.evl_iem_id where s1.evl_table_id = a.evl_table_id and s1.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}' and s.evl_trget_id = d.evl_trget_id and s.evl_cmit_id = a.evl_cmit_id ) as add_score --가점점수합계 , ( select case when count(s.evl_cn) > 0 then '가점' else count(s.evl_cn) || '' end from uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr s /*가점항목*/ inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm s1 on s.evl_iem_id = s1.evl_iem_id where s1.evl_table_id = a.evl_table_id and s1.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}' and s.evl_trget_id = d.evl_trget_id and s.evl_cmit_id = a.evl_cmit_id ) as add_rm --가점비고 , ( select sum(s.evl_score) from uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr s /*가점항목*/ inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm s1 on s.evl_iem_id = s1.evl_iem_id where s1.evl_table_id = a.evl_table_id and s1.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}' and s.evl_trget_id = d.evl_trget_id and s.evl_cmit_id = a.evl_cmit_id ) as minus_score --가점점수합계 , ( select case when count(s.evl_cn) > 0 then '가점' else count(s.evl_cn) || '' end from uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr s /*가점항목*/ inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm s1 on s.evl_iem_id = s1.evl_iem_id where s1.evl_table_id = a.evl_table_id and s1.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}' and s.evl_trget_id = d.evl_trget_id and s.evl_cmit_id = a.evl_cmit_id ) as minus_rm --감점비고 , b.evl_plan_id --평가계획 , c.sect_id , c.sect_nm , t_score.top_score , t_score.lwet_score , t_score.avrg_score , t_score.sm_score from uspt_evl_cmit a /*위원회 테이블*/ inner join uspt_evl_step b /*평가단계 테이블*/ on b.evl_step_id = a.evl_step_id inner join uspt_sect c /*분과 테이블*/ on c.sect_id = a.sect_id inner join uspt_evl_trget d /*평가대상 테이블*/ on d.evl_step_id = b.evl_step_id and d.sect_id = c.sect_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt e /*사업공고신청자 테이블 */ on e.apply_id = d.apply_id left outer join ( select max(t.evl_score) as top_score --최고점수 , min(t.evl_score) as lwet_score --최저점수 , avg(t.evl_score) as avrg_score --평균점수 , sum(t.evl_score) as sm_score --합계점수 , t.evl_trget_id --대상id from ( select b.evl_mfcmm_id --위원id , a.evl_trget_id , ( select sum(evl_score) from uspt_evl_iem_result where evl_result_id = b.evl_result_id ) as evl_score --합계점수 , ( select s3.expert_nm from uspt_evl_mfcmm s1 inner join uspt_extrc_mfcmm s2 on s1.extrc_mfcmm_id = s2.extrc_mfcmm_id inner join uspt_expert s3 on s2.expert_id = s3.expert_id where s1.evl_mfcmm_id = b.evl_mfcmm_id ) as evl_mfcmm_nm --위원명 , a.apply_id --공고신청ID , b.mfcmm_evl_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('MFCMM_EVL_STTUS',mfcmm_evl_sttus_cd) as mfcmm_evl_sttus_nm , b.evl_result_id from uspt_evl_trget a /*평가대상*/ inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm_result b /*평가위원별 결과*/ on a.evl_trget_id = b.evl_trget_id ) t group by t.evl_trget_id ) as t_score /*점수결과 산정*/ on d.evl_trget_id = t_score.evl_trget_id where a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} ) t_data

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlResultByMfcmmList */ select b.evl_mfcmm_id --위원id , a.evl_trget_id , ( select sum(evl_score) from USPT_EVL_IEM_RESULT where evl_result_id = b.evl_result_id ) as evl_score --합계점수 , ( select s3.expert_nm from uspt_evl_mfcmm s1 inner join USPT_EXTRC_MFCMM s2 on s1.extrc_mfcmm_id = s2.extrc_mfcmm_id inner join USPT_EXPERT s3 on s2.expert_id = s3.expert_id where s1.evl_mfcmm_id = b.evl_mfcmm_id ) as evl_mfcmm_nm --위원명 , a.apply_id --공고신청ID , b.mfcmm_evl_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('MFCMM_EVL_STTUS',mfcmm_evl_sttus_cd) as mfcmm_evl_sttus_nm , b.evl_result_id from uspt_evl_trget a /*평가대상*/ inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm_result b /*평가위원별 결과*/ on a.evl_trget_id = b.evl_trget_id where a.evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId}

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlResultBasicInfo */ select a.evl_mfcmm_id --위원id , a.evl_result_id --평가결과id , a.evl_opinion --개별의견 , a.evl_trget_id --평가대상id , b.apply_id --신청id , c.receipt_no --접수번호 , c.member_id --회원id , fn_cmm_get_member (c.member_id) as member_nm --회원명 , a.evl_result_id , ( select s3.expert_nm from uspt_evl_mfcmm s1 inner join uspt_extrc_mfcmm s2 on s1.extrc_mfcmm_id = s2.extrc_mfcmm_id inner join uspt_expert s3 on s2.expert_id = s3.expert_id where s1.evl_mfcmm_id = a.evl_mfcmm_id) as evl_mfcmm_nm /*위원명*/ , ( select evl_mthd_cd from uspt_evl_table where evl_table_id = ( select max(s2.evl_table_id) from uspt_evl_iem_result s1 inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm s2 on s1.evl_iem_id = s2.evl_iem_id where s1.evl_result_id = a.evl_result_id ) ) as evl_mthd_cd --평가방식코드 from uspt_evl_mfcmm_result a /*위원별평가결과*/ inner join uspt_evl_trget b /*평가대상*/ on a.evl_trget_id = b.evl_trget_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt c /*공고신청자*/ on c.apply_id = b.apply_id where a.evl_result_id = #{evlResultId}

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlResultIemDetail */ select b.evl_iem_nm --평가항목 , b.evl_iem_id --평가항목id , b.evl_iem_cn --세부항목 , b.allot_score --배점 , c.evl_score --평가점수 , c.evl_result_id , c.evl_iem_result_id , c.evl_cn --평가내용 from uspt_evl_table a inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm b on a.evl_table_id = b.evl_table_id inner join uspt_evl_iem_result c on c.evl_iem_id = b.evl_iem_id where b.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivGnrl}' and c.evl_result_id = #{evlResultId} and a.evl_table_id = ( select c.evl_table_id from uspt_evl_mfcmm_result a inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm b on a.evl_mfcmm_id = b.evl_mfcmm_id inner join uspt_evl_cmit c on b.evl_cmit_id = c.evl_cmit_id where evl_result_id = #{evlResultId} )

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlResultAddAllotBasicInfo */ select a.adsbtr_resn_cn --가감점사유 , b.apply_id --신청id , c.receipt_no --접수번호 , c.member_id --회원id , fn_cmm_get_member (c.member_id) as member_nm --회원명 , d.task_nm_ko , a.evl_cmit_id , a.evl_trget_id , ( select s2.evl_mthd_cd from uspt_evl_cmit s1 inner join uspt_evl_table s2 on s1.evl_table_id = s2.evl_table_id where evl_cmit_id = a.evl_cmit_id ) as evl_mthd_cd --평가방식코드 from ( select a.evl_trget_id , a.evl_cmit_id , max(a.adsbtr_resn_cn) as adsbtr_resn_cn from uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr a inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm b on a.evl_iem_id = b.evl_iem_id where b.evl_div_cd = #{evlDivCd} and a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and a.evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId} group by evl_trget_id, evl_cmit_id ) a inner join uspt_evl_trget b /*평가대상*/ on a.evl_trget_id = b.evl_trget_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt c /*공고신청자*/ on c.apply_id = b.apply_id left outer join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task d on c.apply_id = d.apply_id

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlResultAddAllotDetail */ select b.evl_iem_nm --평가항목 , b.evl_iem_id --평가항목id , b.evl_iem_cn --세부항목 , b.allot_score --배점 , c.evl_score --평가점수 , c.evl_iem_result_adsbtr_id from uspt_evl_table a inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm b on a.evl_table_id = b.evl_table_id inner join uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr c on c.evl_iem_id = b.evl_iem_id where 1= 1 and b.evl_div_cd = #{evlDivCd} and c.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and c.evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId}

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlOnlineEvlReusltGnrlz */ select a.evl_mfcmm_id /*위원명*/ , b.evl_cn /*평가내용*/ , a.evl_opinion /*개별의견*/ , c.evl_iem_nm /*평가항목명*/ , c.evl_iem_cn /*세부항목내용*/ , ( select s3.expert_nm from uspt_evl_mfcmm s1 inner join uspt_extrc_mfcmm s2 on s1.extrc_mfcmm_id = s2.extrc_mfcmm_id inner join uspt_expert s3 on s2.expert_id = s3.expert_id where s1.evl_mfcmm_id = a.evl_mfcmm_id ) as evl_mfcmm_nm /*전문가명*/ from uspt_evl_mfcmm_result a /*위원별 평가결과*/ inner join uspt_evl_iem_result b /*항목별 평가결과*/ on a.evl_result_id = b.evl_result_id inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm c /*항목*/ on b.evl_iem_id = c.evl_iem_id where a.evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId} and a.evl_mfcmm_id in (select b.evl_mfcmm_id from uspt_evl_cmit a inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm b on a.evl_cmit_id = b.evl_cmit_id where a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId}) and c.evl_iem_id = #{evlIemId}

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectEvlReusltDspthInfo */ select count(b.evl_trget_id) as dspth_trget_co --통보대상수 , max(a.evl_sttus_cd) as evl_sttus_cd --평가진행상태 , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('EVL_STTUS', max(a.evl_sttus_cd)) as evl_sttus_nm , max(a.evl_cmit_id) as evl_cmit_id from uspt_evl_cmit a inner join uspt_evl_trget b on a.sect_id = b.sect_id and a.evl_step_id = b.evl_step_id where a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and b.slctn is true

/** UsptEvlOnlineDao.selectSndngTrgetList */ select b.evl_trget_id , c.member_id , fn_cmm_get_member_nm(c.member_id) as member_nm , cmmt.enc_email , cmmt.enc_mobile_no from uspt_evl_cmit a inner join uspt_evl_trget b on a.sect_id = b.sect_id and a.evl_step_id = b.evl_step_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt c on c.apply_id = b.apply_id left outer join cmmt_member cmmt on cmmt.member_id =c.member_id where a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and b.slctn is true
